name: agnthive
description: Hook-gated multi-agent SDLC profile with a Node.js hook runtime that enforces discover -> design -> implement -> verify -> review -> docs, plus footer, specialist-role, and verification contracts.

enforcement_mode.title: Command policy enforcement mode
enforcement_mode.description: advisory (default) logs dangerous-intent without blocking; enforce denies dangerous commands and fails closed on unparseable input. Any other value is treated as advisory by the runtime.

log_max_bytes.title: Telemetry log rotation threshold (bytes)
log_max_bytes.description: Each JSONL telemetry stream rotates to <name>.old when it reaches this many bytes, so no stream grows unbounded. Default 1048576 (1 MiB). The AGNTHIVE_LOG_MAX_BYTES env var overrides this if set.

ledger_max_bytes.title: Progress ledger byte cap
ledger_max_bytes.description: Byte cap on the durable progress ledger re-injected after context compaction (UTF-8-safe truncation). Default 65536 (64 KiB). The AGNTHIVE_LEDGER_MAX_BYTES env var overrides this if set.
